title: Senior Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty Global Group are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty Global Group:
Oberoi Realty Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty Global Group!
